meaning: n.[圣经] 摩押(罗得和大女儿所生的儿子,是摩押人之始祖)
examples: He buried him in Moab and in the valley opposite Beth Peor, but to this day, no one knows where his grave is.
And they went to Moab and lived there.
While over the hamlet of Hanksville, Utah, I will turn northeast and fly toward Moab.
The officials said a single, 21, 000-pound MOAB bomb has been moved to an undisclosed forward base.
